data.user_prompt: Who offers in-home therapy or community-based mental health support in Louisville?
data.system_message: Answer as a local-search assistant for a person in Louisville, Kentucky. Prefer current local providers and cite source URLs when available.
data.tag: lmhg llm response claude Who offers in-home therapy or community-based mental health support in Louisvill

sections.text:
Here's a comprehensive guide to providers offering **in-home therapy and community-based mental health support** in Louisville, KY:

---

## 🏠 In-Home & Community-Based Mental Health Support in Louisville, KY

---

### 1. 🏥 Seven Counties Services
**📞 502-589-4313 | [louisvilleky.gov](https://louisvilleky.gov/government/health-wellness/community-mental-health-services)**
Seven Counties Services operates a Crisis and Information Center Hotline as well as a **Mobile Crisis Services Team (All Ages)** reachable at 502-589-4313.

This is one of Louisville's primary public behavioral health safety nets, offering community-based crisis intervention.

---

### 2. 👨‍👩‍👧 Boys & Girls Haven – Haven Family Counseling
**📍 2301 Goldsmith Lane, Louisville, KY 40218 | 📞 502-458-1171 | [boysandgirlshaven.org](https://boysandgirlshaven.org/programs/haven-family-counseling/)**

Haven Family Counseling is an outpatient program of Boys & Girls Haven, a private nonprofit that has served the Kentucky community for over 70 years. They specialize in the behavioral and emotional needs of children, adolescents, adults, and families, and **can provide intensive in-home therapy and case management**, or less intensive outpatient services.

annotations.title: Haven Family Counseling | Boys & Girls Haven
Haven Family Counseling | Boys & Girls Haven

sections.text: Sessions are also available online via their telehealth platform.

annotations.title: Haven Family Counseling | Boys & Girls Haven

sections.text: Cultivate BHE offers **Targeted Case Management (TCM)**, which assists Medicaid-eligible recipients in gaining access to medical, behavioral health, social, educational, and other services. TCM-eligible recipients include those diagnosed with a severe mental illness, severe emotional disability, substance use disorder, or a chronic complex health condition.

annotations.title: Mental Health Therapy in Louisville (Mental Health), KY | Autism Treatment - Cultivate BHE

sections.text: Their **Community Support Associates** team also empowers individuals with disabilities to live independently through comprehensive support services.

annotations.title: Mental Health Therapy in Louisville (Mental Health), KY | Autism Treatment - Cultivate BHE

sections.text: Louisville Mental Health Group is a private practice established in 2016, with a multidisciplinary team specializing in individual and family therapy, group therapy, case management, EMDR, **community support**, and reunification services.

annotations.title: Mental Health Clinic In Louisville | Louisville Mental Health Group
Mental Health Clinic In Louisville | Louisville Mental Health Group

sections.text: A case manager can meet you where you are — if you are at risk of homelessness, don't have enough food, or need someone to help you find a therapist or navigate your treatment team.

annotations.title: Mental Health Clinic In Louisville | Louisville Mental Health Group

sections.text: They accept most commercial insurances, all Medicaid plans, and private pay.

annotations.title: Mental Health Clinic In Louisville | Louisville Mental Health Group

sections.text:
---

### 5. 🏢 Kentucky Counseling Center (KCC) – Louisville Highlands
**📍 1169 Eastern Pkwy #3328, Louisville, KY 40217 | [kentuckycounselingcenter.com](https://kentuckycounselingcenter.com/)**

Kentucky Counseling Center offers in-person counseling and psychiatry services at multiple locations while also providing telehealth therapy throughout Kentucky. Patients in Louisville can visit one of their offices or schedule an online therapy appointment.

annotations.title: Mental Health Counseling and Psychiatry | Kentucky Counseling Center

sections.text: The Louisville Highlands office also offers **Targeted Case Management (TCM)** services that provide individuals with a supportive case manager to help find social services like financial assistance, transportation, housing, and more.

annotations.title: Mental Health Counseling and Psychiatry | Kentucky Counseling Center
